description_long: This object is a cylindrical bomb with a robust, industrial design, predominantly black with a prominent yellow hazard band around its midsection. The central section features a bold yellow caution label with a skull and crossbones symbol, surrounded by diagonal hazard stripes, indicating a high level of danger. The surface is segmented with visible seams and panel lines, suggesting a reinforced metal casing. The ends are slightly tapered, giving the bomb a streamlined appearance, and the overall finish is matte with subtle highlights. There are no visible buttons, wires, or timer displays on the exterior, emphasizing a sealed and tamper-resistant construction. The warning label is the most visually striking feature, making the object immediately recognizable as hazardous.
description: A black cylindrical bomb with a yellow caution label and hazard stripes, featuring a robust, segmented metal casing and a matte finish.
description_view_0: The bomb is seen from the side, showing the black cylindrical body with a yellow band at the center but no visible warning label.
description_view_1: This view reveals part of the yellow caution symbol and text, with the hazard band partially visible on the right side.
description_view_2: The front view displays the full yellow caution label with a skull and crossbones, surrounded by hazard stripes, making the warning highly visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side to view 1, showing the yellow band and a partial view of the caution symbol, but less detail than the front.
attribute_detonation_mechanism: No visible external detonation mechanism; detonation may be internal or remotely triggered, as there are no buttons, wires, or timers visible.
